description:
Legal document concerning a quittance of debt, dated 1446 Sel. (1135 CE). Signed by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe and Elʿazar b. Yosef. Mentions Yaʿqūb Abū l-Maʿālī b. Yūsuf, known as Ibn Kujik (כוגך, Kushek, Persian 'Small') and Abū ʿAlī b. Shemuʾel b. Shelomo, known as Ibn al-Dustarī. Bifolio 2r of a court register in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe consisting of four pages and containing four court cases.
(Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
